{{CargoClone
|name=Anubis
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=178
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=For Round 1, CRIT rate +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=When in Dragon Form:
> Gain +1.5% Dragon Chests in explorations
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=When in Dragon Form:
> Gain +2.5% Dragon Chests in explorations
|}}
